title: genvar in always_comb doesn't fail or lint warn during compile when not in a generate block

features.name: genvar declaration at module scope
features.description: Code should include a genvar variable declaration placed at module scope, outside of any generate block

features.name: genvar used in always_comb without generate for-loop
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that uses a genvar variable directly for array indexing, without the genvar being part of a generate for-loop header
